'''Jaw-knee Rise''', probably not his real name, was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] hitman who worked for the [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Grand Council of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]] ended up putting a bounty on Rise's head, a bounty later collected by famed [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. His informant was [[Meen Burtak]].

==Personality and traits==
Jaw-knee Rise was known to be extremely violent as a [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] addict.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
